channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US reimposes blockade on Iran after Strait of Hormuz attacks as tensions escalate
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- U.S. Military Forces Again Blockade Iranian Ports
- US Military Says It Stopped 2 Ships Trying to ‘Run’ Through Iran Blockade
- US resumes Iran ports blockade as Gulf attacks continue: What’s the latest?
- US reimposes its blockade on Iran after Tehran’s attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz
- US reimposes its blockade on Iran after Tehran’s attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz
- Iran threatens to close more vital seaways as US renews blockade
- US reimposes blockade on Iran after Strait of Hormuz attacks]]>

- Death toll from Bangkok bar fire rises to 32 as 2 more die in hospital
